description_long: This object is a modern shotgun with a streamlined, tactical design, predominantly finished in matte black. The body is rectangular and robust, with a long cylindrical barrel extending from the main receiver. A prominent pistol grip is integrated beneath the receiver, and the stock is minimalistic, appearing as a solid extension of the main body. The trigger guard is squared and substantial, providing ample protection around the trigger area. Small orange and metallic details are visible near the grip and receiver, suggesting safety or operational indicators. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, with some polymer components for the grip and stock.
description: A matte black, tactical shotgun with a long barrel, squared trigger guard, and integrated pistol grip, featuring minimalistic stock and subtle orange and metallic details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the long barrel, squared trigger guard, pistol grip, and minimalistic stock.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the narrow profile of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the length and main features of the shotgun from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the end of the stock and the overall slimness of the shotgun's body.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, long barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: squared, elongated trigger guard with a robust, protective shape
